series_metadata.series_description: Checks deposited for payments. i.e., Income Tax, School District Income Tax, Withholding, Pass-Through Entity, Sales Tax, Fuel Use Tax, IFTA and Corporate Franchise Tax.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 30 days then destroy by shredding. If scanned, destroy. ; Electronic: Retain for 30 days then delete., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
